message:
feat(abi): nativize fenv_abi (full x86_64 inline asm), nativize 80+ glibc_internal symbols, rustfmt pass

fenv_abi: Replace all 11 glibc dlvsym delegation paths with native x86_64
inline assembly that directly manipulates x87 FPU control/status words and
SSE MXCSR registers. This eliminates the fenv_delegate! macro, AtomicPtr
lazy-lookup infrastructure, and all dlvsym_next calls for fenv functions.
The new implementation includes:
- Native fegetround/fesetround via fnstcw/fldcw + stmxcsr/ldmxcsr
- Native feclearexcept/fetestexcept/feraiseexcept via fnstenv/fldenv
- Native fegetenv/fesetenv with FE_DFL_ENV sentinel support (fninit reset)
- Native feholdexcept (save + fnclex + mask all exceptions)
- Native feupdateenv (capture pending, restore env, re-raise)
- Typed fegetexceptflag/fesetexceptflag signatures (*mut u16 instead of
  *mut c_void) matching glibc fexcept_t
- Comprehensive inline test suite covering roundtrips, edge cases, and
  null pointer guards
- FenvT struct matching glibc x86_64 32-byte layout

glibc_internal_abi: Convert ~80 symbols from dlsym_passthrough! to native
implementations:
- __sched_* (6 symbols): direct libc syscalls instead of dlsym
- __ctype32_b/tolower/toupper: forward to ctype_abi native tables
- __isctype: native ctype_b table lookup
- __iswctype/__iswctype_l: forward to wchar_abi::iswctype
- wcscasecmp_l/wcsncasecmp_l: forward to wchar_abi native implementations
- strfrom* (5 symbols): forward to string_abi::strfromf/strfromd/strfroml
- strtof32/f32x/f64/f64x/f128 + _l variants (10 symbols): forward to
  stdlib_abi::strtof/strtod/strtold
- wcstof32/f32x/f64/f64x/f128 + _l variants (10 symbols): forward to
  wchar_abi::wcstof/wcstod/wcstold
- wcstoq/wcstouq: forward to wchar_abi::wcstoll/wcstoull
- wcswcs: native wide substring search (deprecated wcsstr alias)
- wmempcpy: native wide memcpy returning pointer past end
- __nl_langinfo_l, __newlocale, __freelocale, __uselocale, __duplocale:
  forward to locale_abi native implementations
- __dcgettext/__dgettext: native C-locale passthrough (return msgid)
- native_ldexp: pure f64 bit-manipulation helper for math functions
- Nativize ~30 math functions: __finite, __finitef, __isinf, __isinff,
  __isnan, __isnanf, __signbit, __signbitf, __fpclassify, __fpclassifyf,
  __issignaling, __issignalingf, copysignf, scalbn, scalbnf, scalbnl,
  scalblnf, scalblnl, __scalbn, __scalbnf, ldexpf, __ldexp, __ldexpf,
  significand, significandf, fmaf, __fma, __fmaf, exp10, exp10f, pow10,
  pow10f
- Profiling stubs (_mcleanup, _mcount, mcount, moncontrol, monstartup,
  profil, sprofil): no-op stubs instead of dlsym
- __fentry__: GCC -pg function entry hook no-op stub
- __cxa_finalize: native atexit handler runner
- __stack_chk_fail: native stack smash abort handler
- __assert_fail/__assert_perror_fail: native assertion abort handlers

ctype_abi: Add #[allow(dead_code)] annotations on ctype_b_table_ptr,
tolower_table_ptr, toupper_table_ptr since they are called from
glibc_internal_abi (cfg(not(test))).

lib.rs: Fix alphabetical ordering of io_abi/isoc_abi module declarations.

pthread_abi/string_abi/unistd_abi/wchar_abi/rpc_abi: rustfmt pass —
multi-parameter function signatures reformatted to one-parameter-per-line
style, single-parameter functions collapsed to single-line signatures.

fenv_abi_test.rs: Update integration test to use typed u16 pointers for
fegetexceptflag/fesetexceptflag matching the new native signatures.

iconv/mod.rs: rustfmt chain expression in iconv_open.

support_matrix.json: Promote 12 fenv symbols from GlibcCallThrough to
Implemented status. Add module annotations to ~115 _IO_* and glibc
internal symbols that were previously missing module metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
